Phase-77.NAME: User Subscription Calendar and Mobile Dock Polish
Phase-77.summary: Approved frontend-only polish for subscription status copy, calendar day emphasis, clickable config guidance, always-visible mobile cabinet navigation, and touch-scroll stability.

scope.in: User frontend SubscriptionPanel, user Layout, shared user CSS, Phase-77 static smoke, and MyGRACE docs for the touched frontend modules.
scope.out: Backend APIs, billing/trial math, scheduler, VPN/MTProto runtime, admin frontend, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, DNS/TLS, release tagging, GitHub push, and live server mutation.

requirements.requirement-1: Active subscription helper copy must say "Доступ активен до: [дата]" instead of generic timer-auto copy.
requirements.requirement-2: Subscription calendar must distinguish activation day, current day, and expiry day with green, cyan, and red pulse treatments while preserving reduced-motion readability.
requirements.requirement-3: The pending first-connection sentence must make "Конфиг" a bold accent link to /dashboard/config without changing trial activation semantics.
requirements.requirement-4: Mobile cabinet navigation must remain fixed and visible at the bottom of the viewport with safe-area spacing and no content overlap.
requirements.requirement-5: Mobile scroll/touch behavior must not be blocked by fixed Matrix layers, bottom navigation, nested overflow containers, or viewport-height drift.

steps.step-1: Updated SubscriptionPanel contract, copy helpers, and expiry-date rendering for the active-access text.
steps.step-2: Rendered "Конфиг" as a bold accent route link to /dashboard/config in the pending first-connection sentence.
steps.step-3: Added calendar day roles and class markers for range start, today, and range end without trusting client time for subscription authority.
steps.step-4: Added Matrix CSS pulse styles for acid green start, cyan today, red expiry, and reduced-motion static fallback.
steps.step-5: Made the mobile cabinet bottom navigation explicitly fixed, safe-area-aware, always visible, and non-intercepting outside its own controls.
steps.step-6: Repaired mobile touch-scroll by making the shell/main scroll surface explicit and preserving pointer-events none on Matrix visual layers.
steps.step-7: Added Phase-77 static smoke for requested strings, route link, calendar classes, dock markers, scroll-safety markers, and protected-surface guard.
steps.step-8: Ran frontend build, Phase-77 smoke, selected user responsive/regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/runtime guard.

data-flow.flow-1: Subscription API active_until -> SubscriptionPanel formatted date -> user-visible active-access helper copy.
data-flow.flow-2: Subscription API active range plus local today display date -> calendar cell role classes -> CSS pulse treatments only.
data-flow.flow-3: User tap/click on "Конфиг" -> React Router /dashboard/config navigation -> existing config workflow.
data-flow.flow-4: Viewport safe-area and content padding -> fixed bottom nav remains visible while main content remains scrollable.

verification-design.gate-1: SubscriptionPanel source contains no old "Доступ активен. Таймер обновляется автоматически." copy.
verification-design.gate-2: Pending-copy config link uses /dashboard/config and does not become an external reload link.
verification-design.gate-3: Calendar classes for start, today, and end are present with green/cyan/red role markers and reduced-motion fallback.
verification-design.gate-4: Mobile dock CSS has fixed bottom placement, safe-area padding, stable touch targets, and matching content bottom padding.
verification-design.gate-5: Matrix visual layers remain pointer-events none and scroll containers expose touch-action/overscroll policy without scroll hijacking.

commands.command: cd frontend && npm run build passed: primary JS 437.85 kB gzip 136.74 kB, primary CSS 52.79 kB gzip 10.64 kB.
node scripts/phase61-responsive-adaptation-smoke.mjs passed after frontend and frontend-admin builds refreshed dist artifacts.

python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-77.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/modules/M-009.xml docs/modules/M-036.xml docs/modules/M-063.xml docs/modules/M-071.xml docs/modules/M-074.xml docs/modules/M-075.xml docs/modules/M-077.xml docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification/V-M-036.xml docs/verification/V-M-063.xml docs/verification/V-M-071.xml docs/verification/V-M-074.xml docs/verification/V-M-075.xml docs/verification/V-M-077.xml passed.

mygrace lint, git diff --check, and protected diff guard over install.sh, docker-compose.yml, nginx, deploy, deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml, .env.example, backend/app, backend/tests, mtproto-runtime, official-mtproxy, telegram-bot, frontend-admin passed.

execution-evidence.result: PASS local: active-access copy now shows "Доступ активен до: [дата]", pending config guidance links to /dashboard/config, calendar start/today/end markers use green/cyan/red pulse classes, mobile dock is fixed and safe-area-aware, mobile scroll surface markers are present, and protected backend/admin/deploy/runtime surfaces stayed clean.

risks.risk-1: Fixed mobile navigation can hide lower content if bottom padding and safe-area are not updated together.
risks.risk-2: Nested overflow or fixed visual layers can make touch scrolling feel broken on mobile browsers.
risks.risk-3: Calendar pulses can become visually noisy if start, today, and end overlap; CSS must preserve readable priority and reduced-motion fallback.

Phase-77.acceptance: Phase-77 is done when requested subscription copy/link/calendar/mobile-dock fixes pass static and build verification, older user responsive/subscription/config/navigation/motion regressions remain green, MyGRACE is synchronized, and protected backend/admin/deploy/runtime surfaces are clean.
